vllm.title: Add contributing guideline and mypy config
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #73
This PR adds CONTRIGUING.md and mypy configs. While the repository currently does not completely pass the mypy tests, it helps me identify some type bugs in our codebase. Those bugs are also fixed in this PR.

vllm.title: Print warnings/errors for large swap space
vllm.author: WoosukKwon

vllm.title: Incrementally decode output tokens
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #119
This PR reduces the overhead of the tokenizer by incrementally decoding the output tokens at every step. Specifically, the detokenization process is split into two stages:

Convert token ids to token strings (i.e., List[int] -> List[str])
Concatenate the token strings to the output text (
